name: WatchGuard
description: Monitor WatchGuard Cloud firewall policies, device management, and security alerts for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to WatchGuard Cloud at cloud.watchguard.com
2. Go to Administration > Managed Access
3. Create a new API credential or copy existing ones
4. Note your Access ID, Access Password, and API Key
5. Select your data region (USA, Europe, or Australia)
6. Enter the credentials below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in WatchGuard Cloud > Administration > Managed Access

credentialFields.label: Access ID (Read-write)
credentialFields.helpText: Read-write Access ID from WatchGuard Cloud > Administration > Managed Access

credentialFields.label: Access Password
credentialFields.helpText: Read-write password from WatchGuard Cloud > Administration > Managed Access

credentialFields.label: API Region
credentialFields.helpText: Select your WatchGuard Cloud data region

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Check security alerts and system events
